prestazioni: Turbocharged L15B7T (1.5L VTEC Turbo) engine upgrade with a Garrett GT2867R Gen II turbo (0.63 A/R, 67mm compressor wheel) paired with a PRL Motorsports Stage 3 turbo manifold (304 stainless steel, TIG-welded) and a custom 3-inch downpipe featuring a Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter for optimized spool and reduced backpressure.

Full bolt-on fuel system overhaul including a Radium Engineering 2009-2023 CR-V port injection kit (dual 1000cc/min injectors) with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, AEM 340lph inline pump, and a Hondata KPro4 ECU reflash with custom ethanol (E85) mapping for 300+ WHP on 93 octane (400+ WHP on E85).

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 80mm-120mm ride height range) with custom valving for the CR-V’s 5x114.3 bolt pattern, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90a durometer) for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (2023+ CR-V specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom matte black PPF wrap and aggressive 30mm extended wheel arches to accommodate 19x10.5 ET25 (front) and 19x11.5 ET30 (rear) Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (5x114.3, +45 offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear).

Seibon Carbon fiber hood (OEM replacement, 50% weight reduction) with a custom vented heat extractor (3D-printed ABS, functional for turbocharged L15B7T) and a Vortex Generator lip spoiler (carbon fiber, 3M VHB tape-mounted) for improved high-speed stability and reduced lift.

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FIA-approved, 6-point harness compatible) mounted on custom aluminum seat rails (CR-V-specific, bolt-in), a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (6-bolt, MOMO Mod.77 suede wheel), and a full Alcantara headliner (custom stitched, matching Honda Black Edition trim) with red contrast stitching.
